```sql
SELECT 
  u.user_id, 
  u.user_name, 
  r.recommendation_id, 
  r.recommendation_name, 
  r.positive_aspects, 
  r-negative_aspects, 
  u.preference_elements 
FROM 
  users u 
  JOIN recommendations r ON u.user_id = r.user_id

  u.user_name = 'Music Lover'

  AND u.preference_elements LIKE '%emotional impact%' 
  AND u.preference_elements LIKE '%guitar interplay%' 
  AND u.preference_elements LIKE '%classic rock%';
```
